description.en: The mode for isolating access to data in the object stores that are in the scope of the transaction. The default value isreadonly.

excerpt.es: The mode for isolating access to data in the object stores that are in the scope of the transaction. The default value isreadonly.
excerpt.en: The mode for isolating access to data in the object stores that are in the scope of the transaction. The default value isreadonly.

description.en: Affects how the index behaves when the result of evaluating the index's key path yields an array. Iftrue, there is one record in the index for each item in an array of keys. Iffalse, then there is one record for each key that is an array.
